creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I don't see how it will helping with your issue, because Yelp's yelp.desktop 
doesn't has any of 'MimeType' in there. The update-desktop-database will 
looking for all *.desktop that have 'MimeType' then create a small database 
or cache of it.
